heading: About CMC
text: Children Medical Center | Home About | Help | Login | Emergency : 1005 CMC Hospital Home Patient Login Contact About   | Help   | Login A hospital that cares about your child's health More than you Health Care We take care of everything Volunteer Join a CMC team in Lucknow, and know the difference About CMC Children Medical Centre CHILDREN MEDICAL CENTRE houses the sub-specialities of Pediatric Surgery, Electrophysiology and Pacing, Clinical and Preventive Cardiology and Interventional Cardiology, where an integrated team of cardiac surgeons and cardiologists works in tandem. Backed up with the latest technology including a unique hybrid operating suite, the dedicated team of Cardiac Surgery doctors has performed a staggering 50,000+ CABG surgeries. The team is expert in off-pump CABG, robotic heart surgery, and minimally invasive valve and coronary heart bypass techniques. Hope. Care. Love. A destination for advance care. Giving your child the best possible treatment. Learn More Services OPD Best OPD service in town comes to you. Know More IPD Indoor care with highly efficient medical machines is at your service 24*7. Know More Pathology Now get your test reports in a blink. Know More Why Choose CMC Our cross-cultural environment, state-of-the-art treatment and high quality healthcare at affordable cost are some of the many reasons why numerous patients from across the world choose to come to us for some of the most complex treatments during organ transplants and cardiac ailments. 7,000+ Patients across India Per Year A+ Hospital Service 100% Happy Patient Record CMC Health Cards Now access all your health records at one place.
